assignmentType.description: The assignment type of how the user receives this target

expiration.description: The expiry time stamp of the associated target. It's only included in the response if the associated target will expire.

orn.description: The [Okta Resource Name (ORN)](https://support.okta.com/help/s/article/understanding-okta-resource-name-orn) of the app target or group target

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
